description: Augmentation rules for replacing uninformative 'Nothing happens.' feedback with targeted, diagnostic messages. Rules are evaluated in priority order. No rule leaks the solution path.
detection_strategy: Compare attempted command against admissible_commands. If command matches 'Nothing happens.' observation, analyze command structure and current PDDL facts to identify cause.

rules.name: put_while_hands_empty
rules.description: Agent tries 'move X to Y' or 'put X in/on Y' while holding nothing
rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'move <obj> to <recep>' AND no 'holds' fact exists in current facts
rules.augmented_feedback: You are not holding anything. You need to pick up an object before you can place it somewhere.

rules.name: take_from_closed_container
rules.description: Agent tries to take an object from a container that is closed

trigger.state_check: target receptacle has 'openable' fact but NOT 'opened' fact

rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'take <obj> from <recep>' AND <recep> is openable but not opened AND obj would be in that recep if opened
rules.augmented_feedback: The {container} is closed. You need to open it first before you can take anything from it.

rules.name: take_object_not_at_location
rules.description: Agent tries to take an object that is not in the specified receptacle (object exists somewhere else, or receptacle doesn't have it)

trigger.state_check: object exists in facts but is NOT in the specified receptacle

rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'take <obj> from <recep>' AND object is known (has inreceptacle fact) but is in a DIFFERENT receptacle (not <recep>), AND container is not closed (ruled out by R02)
rules.augmented_feedback: You cannot take {object} from {container}. That object is not there. Try looking around other locations.

rules.name: open_already_open
rules.description: Agent tries to open a container that is already open
rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'open <recep>' AND 'opened(<recep>)' fact is present

rules.name: close_already_closed
rules.description: Agent tries to close a container that is already closed

trigger.state_check: target receptacle is openable but has no 'opened' fact

rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'close <recep>' AND <recep> is openable but not opened

rules.name: heat_cool_clean_without_holding
rules.description: Agent tries to heat/cool/clean an object without holding it

trigger.state_check: no holds(agent1, *) fact OR held object does not match

rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'heat/cool/clean <obj> with <appliance>' AND either agent holds nothing OR agent holds a different object than <obj>
rules.augmented_feedback: You are not holding {object}. You need to pick it up before you can {action} it.

rules.name: pick_up_second_object
rules.description: Agent tries to take an object while already holding one

trigger.state_check: holds(agent1, X) fact present for some X

rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'take <obj> from <recep>' AND a 'holds' fact is present (agent already holds something) AND container is open or not openable (so it's not a closed container error)
rules.augmented_feedback: You are already holding {held_object}. You can only carry one object at a time. Put it down first.
rules.catalog_cause: pick_up_second_object (implicit - not in catalog, but mechanically the same as take_from_wrong_location when holding)

rules.name: use_appliance_without_holding
rules.description: Agent tries 'use <desklamp>' or interacts with an appliance without holding the target object
rules.detection_logic: Command matches 'use <lamp/appliance>' AND no 'holds' fact is present
rules.augmented_feedback: You are not holding anything. To examine an object under a lamp, you must first pick up the object, then use the lamp.

rules.name: invalid_unrecognized_command
rules.description: Command is completely unrecognized (does not match any known command template)

trigger.command_pattern: does not match any known grammar pattern

rules.detection_logic: Command does not match any of the recognized verb patterns (go to, take, move, open, close, examine, use, heat, cool, clean, slice, inventory, look, help)
rules.augmented_feedback: That command is not recognized. Valid actions include: go to, take, move, open, close, examine, use, heat, cool, clean. Type 'help' to see all commands.

rules.name: progress_hint_correct_object_picked_up
rules.description: Agent picks up an object that is relevant to the current task goal (positive reinforcement)

trigger.state_check: held object type matches a type needed for task completion per goal description

rules.detection_logic: Observation matches 'You pick up the <obj>' AND the object type appears in the task goal string (e.g., goal says 'heat some apple' and agent picks up 'apple 1')
rules.augmented_feedback: You pick up the {object}. [Good - you are holding the {object_type} needed for the task.]

rules.name: exploration_guidance_nothing_here
rules.description: Agent arrives at a location that has nothing relevant to the task

trigger.state_check: agent holds nothing AND no task-relevant objects are here

rules.detection_logic: Observation contains 'you see nothing' AND agent is not holding the target object type AND this location has no task-relevant items
rules.augmented_feedback: {original_obs} There is nothing useful here for your current task. Keep exploring.

fallback.description: If 'Nothing happens.' but none of the above rules match, append a generic hint
fallback.augmented_feedback: Nothing happens. The action could not be performed in the current state. Check your inventory and the state of nearby objects.

invariants: NEVER reveal the exact solution path
NEVER tell the agent exactly where the target object is
